label: The Difference
heading: Why we stay small — and why it matters.

items.title: Consistent Team
items.desc: With a maximum of 8 clients, we can guarantee the same workers attend every shift. No strangers. No last-minute changes. Just people who know you.

items.title: High Quality, Always
items.desc: We don't sacrifice quality for volume. Every client receives thorough, individualised attention because we're never stretched beyond what we can do well.

items.title: Extremely High Satisfaction
items.desc: Our workers are engaged, supported, and invested — because they're not burnt out managing 40+ clients. Happy workers mean better support for you.

items.title: Person-Centred, Always
items.desc: We build plans around the person — their goals, their strengths, their life. No cookie-cutter approaches. No one-size-fits-all shortcuts.
